title: Multi-Agent Consensus & Voting
technical_implementation: Implemented ConflictClassifier with CRITICAL, MAJOR, MINOR categorizations using STRIDE rules
Implemented ConsensusEngine mathematically driven by score = Σ(Confidence × RoleWeight × DomainRelevance) / Σ(RoleWeight)
Added async _negotiate_round to resolve MAJOR conflicts with up to 2 rounds
Integrated fallback protections for token budget depletion (<20%) and maximum rounds exceeded
Integrated ConsensusResult output into cli.py with rich interface formatting
Created role_weights.yaml containing baseline definitions for Security, Architect, UX roles
